title: Ord Sabaok

'''Ord Sabaok''' was a [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. During the [[Pius Dea Era]], it served as an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]] [[Colonist/Legends|outpost]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. It came to be [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and was the home of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Barthalemew Windsloe]], who worked undercover to gather information from the Imperials while living there.

==Description==
Ord Sabaok was a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|421|Ord Sabaok}}</ref> located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds']] [[Ord Sabaok system/Legends|Ord Sabaok system]],<ref name="TEA" /> part of the [[Southern Core]].<ref name="Southern" /> Between [[12,000 BBY/Legends|12,000 BBY]] and [[11,000 BBY]], a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] connected Ord Sabaok to the [[Giju system/Legends|Giju system]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==History==
[[File:Barthalemew_Windsloe.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Barthalamew Windsloe worked undercover on Ord Sabaok.]]
Ord Sabaok served as an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]] [[Colonist/Legends|outpost]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Pius Dea Era]], a period of [[Time/Legends|time]] that lasted between 12,000 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]] and 11,000 BBY, despite it being located outside the borders of Republic [[Realspace/Legends|space]].<ref name="EGTW" /> By the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Ord Sabaok was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] and had a number of exclusive clubs<ref name="CRO" /> and posh [[Casino/Legends|casinos]].<ref name="CSWE" /> The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Barthalemew Windsloe]], who worked undercover for the Alliance as part of the Empire, lived at Ord Sabaok among many other young [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]].<ref name="CRO" />

Windsloe was often found in Ord Sabaok's clubs surrounded by [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] [[Officer/Legends|officers]], who giggled at his jokes and talk of his own romantic entanglements. In that relaxed atmosphere, Windsloe was able to get the officers to give up more information than they usually would, allowing him to hear news that most others were unaware of. The spy made reports to a cargo [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] linked to the Rebel Alliance that made runs to Ord Sabaok every [[Standard week/Legends|week]], ensuring that the information was relayed to [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] agents.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ord Sabaok was first mentioned in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] supplement published by [[West End Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Ord Sabaok [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the world itself, in grid square J-13.<ref name="TEA" />
